name: Licorice Root Extract
description: A natural brightener containing glabridin, an active component that inhibits pigmentation.
scientificSummary: Disperses melanin and inhibits the tyrosinase enzyme that causes sun spots.
mechanismOfAction: Disperses melanin and inhibits the tyrosinase enzyme that causes sun spots.

seo.title: Licorice Root Extract - Clinical Profile & Compatibility | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover the scientific benefits, compatibility, and clinical profile of Licorice Root Extract in skincare.
